productDisplayName: BIBA OUTLET Women Printed Multi Tunic
description: Composition Pink printed Tunic made of 100% cotton, has an empire waist with drawstrings, short sleeves with a button tab and panel stitch on the side Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Classic patterning on contemporary styles by biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do.
